name: Chocolate Bread Pudding with Raspberry Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 package frozen raspberries in light syrup, unfrozen
recipeInstructions:
Pudding:
1. Cube the bread and place it in a large bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, combine the milk, cocoa powder, sugar, and vanilla extract until well blended.
3. Add the egg whites to the mixture and stir gently.
4. Pour the batter over the bread cubes. Cover and let stand in the refrigerator for 30-45 minutes.
5. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
6. Place the pudding mixture in an oven-safe dish and set it in a water bath (about 1-inch of water). Bake for 45 minutes.
Raspberry Sauce:
7. Puree the frozen raspberries in a blender.
8. Strain the puree through a sieve to remove seeds, if desired.
9. Refrigerate the sauce until serving time.
10. For each serving, use approximately 2 tablespoons (Tbsp) of raspberry sauce.
11. Serve the sauce on a plate alongside the pudding, and garnish with fresh berries.
Note: Do not preheat or execute the oven by forcefully turning it off during cooking.
